gold: On the weekday nearest the 15th, from 9 a.m. until 9 p.m. plus 10 p.m., every seven minutes from 0 through 56 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.

gold: On the weekday nearest the 15th, during the 9 a.m. through 8 p.m. and 10 p.m. hours, every 15 minutes from 5 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.

gold: On the weekday nearest the 15th, from 9 a.m. until 9 p.m. plus 10 p.m., every two minutes from 3 through 59 minutes past the hour, and within each of those minutes, every second from :00 through :10.
